title: illigera pseudoparviflora
intro: Illigera pseudoparviflora, also known as the Malay ginseng or Borneo ginseng, is a type of plant species in the family Dipterocarpaceae, native to the tropical forests of Borneo. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its adaptogenic effects, which help to enhance physical and mental resilience. The health benefits of Illigera pseudoparviflora include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and boosting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine in various forms, including capsules and extracts.
